data.title: SNEC and Spectacle Hut partner to provide eyewear for low vision patients ahead of SG60 celebration.
data.description: SNEC, Spectacle Hut, and the OneSight EssilorLuxottica Foundation are collaborating to enhance access to specialized eyewear for individuals with low vision before SG60.

data.title: Coway in South Korea reveals Q2 FY2025 financial results, highlighting investments in core areas.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on August 8, 2025, Coway Co., Ltd., known as the "Best Life Solution Company," announced its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The company highlighted a focus on key areas including Research and Development (R&D), marketing, and digital transformation, with these investments yielding positive results. The exact financial figures were not disclosed; however, the company emphasized the impact of these strategic investments on its overall performance.

data.title: CleanSpark's Q3 revenue hits record high of nearly $200 million, up 91% from a year ago - its most successful quarter.
data.description: CleanSpark's third quarter financial results revealed a significant increase in revenue, amounting to almost $200 million. This marked a substantial 91% rise compared to the previous year.

data.title: DarkIris Inc. prices IPO at $4/share for 1.5 million shares on Nasdaq starting Aug 8, '25 as "DKI".
data.description: On August 7, 2025, DarkIris Inc. revealed the pricing details for its initial public offering of 1,500,000 Class A ordinary shares at $4.00 per share. DarkIris is a tech company focused on mobile digital games distributed across third-party digital platforms. The Class A shares will trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market starting August 8, 2025, under the ticker symbol "DKI."

data.title: John Shegerian of ERI discusses circular economy at 2025 ITAD Summit in Vegas with Darrell Fleming-Kendall and other experts.
data.description: Last week in Las Vegas, John Shegerian, Chairman and CEO of ERI, joined a panel discussion on the circular economy at the ITAD Summit held at the Bellagio Hotel & Casino. The event was hosted by Darrell Fleming-Kendall, Events Manager and Special Projects Director, and focused on topics related to resource recovery, ITAD, mobility, and data destruction/processing. Shegerian was among the expert panelists who shared insights on sustainable practices. This event attracted a significant audience and emphasized the importance of embracing environmental initiatives in business operations.
